summary: Plan mode keeps #88713 as the live canonical PR for the docs helper-comment representative path. No close, merge, or fix actions are planned: #81786 and #83874 are independent feature/guardrail work; #88639, #88875, #89157, and #89295 are related but distinct inline-comment follow-ups; #88554 is already merged/closed context.

actions.reason: #81786 is in the agent area but has a different root cause and implementation surface than the #88713 documentation-comment path.
#83874 is broad agent runtime-contract work, not a duplicate or replacement for #88713's inline helper-comment documentation.
#88554 is merged historical context for the inline-comment pass and needs no action.
#88639 is related to the same documentation-comment campaign, but it has unique useful scope and should not be closed as a duplicate of #88713.
#88713 is open, matches the representative title, and is the clearest surviving canonical for the agent helper-comment documentation path.
#88875 belongs to the same broad inline-comment campaign but has a distinct markdown/shared-helper surface and should remain separate from #88713.
#89157 is a related continuation of the documentation-comment work, but its reusable helper and voice-call scope is unique.
#89295 is related documentation work in an auth-adjacent area, but the artifact does not show a security report or a duplicate of #88713.
